hotel_name: Tuấn Đạt Luxury FLC Sầm Sơn (Tuan Đat Luxury FLC Sam Son)

reviews.title: The room is okay.
reviews.text: Far location, dirty swimming pool, poor breakfast (instant noodles).

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: They didn't allow us to use the pool. Staff weren't helpful. It was too noisy.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Small, clean hotel with friendly staff. Located in the very convenient and secure FLC area. Close to restaurants and the beach.

reviews.title: Hôtel calme et confortable
reviews.positives: Excellent hôtel avec un personnel particulièrement attentionné et serviable. Nous avons été surclassé à notre arrivé. Je recommande vivement !
reviews.negatives: RAS

reviews.title: Very good for the price.
reviews.text: I booked a single room, but the hotel ran out of that room, so I got to stay in a double room with a balcony instead. The owner is very cute and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Excellent séjour
reviews.positives:
Jolie surprise pour cet hôtel à 500 m de la mer dans un quartier sécurisé par un gardien.
Excellent accueil du patron de l'établissement qui nous a offert de l'eau en attendant que le ménage soit terminé dans la chambre que nous avons avec deux heures d'avance.
La chambre est telle que décrite dans notre réservation, spacieuse, propre et bien équipée.
Rapport qualité-prix excellent.
Manque juste une bouilloire
reviews.negatives:
La musique très forte dans le hall matin midi soir
Le petit déjeuner exclusivement vietnamien 
Les phos boeuf ou poulet le matin ça passe pas

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The rooms are clean and the staff is friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Un accueil très sympathique, le personnel ouvert cherche une solution à toutes les demandes. 
Hôtel à recommander
.

reviews.title: Okay.
reviews.text: Reasonable price, close to the beach. Comfortable parking. Friendly owner.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Der Besitzer war so nett und hat nur eine Nacht unserer 2 Zimmer berechnet
reviews.negatives:
Leider war zu der gebuchten Zeit wirklich niemand rum, die Stadt war komplett ausgestorben. Sogar der Taxifahrer wusste nicht, ob in der Gegend überhaupt etwas auf hat. 
Der Besitzer hat behauptet, es wären alle Geschäfte später auf, wir sind dann am Strand entlang gelaufen und hatten Mühe auch nur ein Cafe zu finden. Stuttgart Lebensmittelgeschäfte waren alle zu. 
Pool auf dem Dach war nicht verwendbar, wir habet dann eine Nacht in Bar bezahlt und sind wieder gegeben um in der Stadt zu übernachten. Eigentümer hat booking mitgeteilt wir wollen nicht erschienen.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean, beautiful, but there is no hair dryer.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Das Zimmer war groß und geräumig. Es war alles vorhanden, wir haben auch jeden Tag frische Handtücher bekommen. Der Inhaber war sehr freundlich konnte jedoch kein Englisch. Es war alles sehr sauber. Den Pool haben wir leider nicht getestet.
reviews.negatives:
Die Lage war zwar sehr ruhig aber du musstest immer ein Tuck Tuck nehmen um weg zu kommen oder 2-3 km laufen.
Gab leider auch fast nur Seafood Restaurants.

reviews.title: Go to work
reviews.text: The hotel owner is very friendly, everyone. He is extremely pleasant, the rooms are clean, it's low season with few guests, and the prices are cheap.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Không có
reviews.negatives: Quá tệ, khách sạn không giải quyết vấn đề

reviews.title: Affordable, convenient, and attentive.
reviews.text: The price is very cheap compared to double rooms, with new amenities. Fully equipped with new and clean interiors, and the service is very attentive and enthusiastic. The swimming pool is quite small but still acceptable for the price; the location is a bit difficult to find. You have to walk quite far or take a shuttle bus for 50k to get to the beach. There are quite a few ants in the room if you smell food.

reviews.title: Quá tệ.
reviews.negatives:
Khách sạn xa trung tâm, quá vắng vẻ, ko xứng đáng đánh giá ks 3 sao, ko có tiện ích gì.
O ép, bắt chẹt khách hàng.

reviews.title: Thank you very much.
reviews.text: Choosing a hotel as a resting place for the trip is a very wise decision. The hotel is well-equipped, the rooms are clean, and the prices are reasonable. The hotel provides drinking water, free Wi-Fi, comfortable parking, and the area is very secure. The staff is friendly, especially the receptionist who is very enthusiastic and lovely. The breakfast is delicious, and afterwards, the staff made a great glass of iced milk coffee. The hotel also has a private swimming pool on the rooftop for families going to the beach, allowing small children to swim there.

reviews.title: A bad experience – this hotel should not be open off season
reviews.positives: The room was big and adequately clean. There's little else to recommend this place.
reviews.negatives:
The hotel staff initially contacted me by email (= booking.com messenger) to ask if I wanted breakfast. When I said yes, they told me they could not serve breakfast. I asked why, they said it’s because it’s not included in the room price. The staff spoke no English, the security on the front gate unwelcoming (it was blocked off when we arrived), the location bad – there's nothing to do and nowhere to go during off season. The windows rattled, whistled and leaked when it was stormy outside. The walls were mouldy, and electrical cables were sticking out of the bathroom wall.

I went off season (in November) and all the local restaurants were closed; one lady even said to us, "why are you here? this town is closed."

reviews.title: its good
reviews.positives: Cheap rental price, spacious room, large bed, and big bathroom. I only stayed for one day so I didn’t use the pool, but went to the beach instead. The beach near the hotel was quite dirty and crowded. It's better if you’re willing to drive a bit further to a more remote beach — much nicer, but still requires a car as walking can be tiring. The staff were okay. However, if you have small children, be cautious — the bathroom window opens quite wide and could be dangerous for kids
reviews.negatives: My room had two beds — one was perfectly fine, but the other had a sunken spring mattress that was quite uncomfortable and caused back pain. I think that mattress should be replaced. Everything else was fine.

reviews.title: good 1 night stay at nice hotel
reviews.positives: owner & staff are very helpful
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: Very friendly and clean
reviews.positives: Very friendly, nice and comfy room…they wanted us to be happy at any time
reviews.negatives: There was some construction next to the hotel

reviews.title: Very good value for money
reviews.positives: The hotel was located in an area where there are lots of development and I was amazed what I got for my money. The balcony was huge the room was huge and clean. Located on the beach.

reviews.title: Great value hotel 👍🏻
reviews.positives: Amazing hotel near the beach! Great value and very clean. We were greeted by friendly staff. Would come back here again.
